LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.InventoryModeT: Shows only items held in valid player storage on this storage unit's map, plus items enabled in the current draft. Batch actions affect only the current search results. Loose recognition can be enabled in mod settings.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.AllModeTip: Shows every registered item in the current category. Batch actions retain the framework's original behavior.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.WarehouseStock: Total quantity on the storage unit's map under the current recognition mode; excludes the unit's internal virtual inventory. Strict mode counts valid storage only; loose mode counts player-usable non-forbidden items.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.RefreshTip: Force-rebuild the inventory snapshot for this storage unit's map and update the summary and warehouse stock column. Category, mode, and search text are kept.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.SummaryTip: Inventory candidate kinds / registered kinds in the current category. The summary ignores search text; candidates include map stock plus currently enabled draft items.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Settings.Loose: When enabled, counts all player-usable, non-forbidden spawned items on the current map, even outside valid storage. Still excludes other maps, unspawned carried/equipped items, and framework storage-unit virtual inventory.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Settings.Stric: When disabled, strict mode is used: only items in valid player storage locations are counted.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Perf.SnapshotR: Inventory snapshot rebuilt: map={mapId} mode={mode} scanned={scanned} kinds={kinds} ms={ms} cacheTicks={cacheTicks}
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Error.MissingT: Required framework members could not be found: {targets}. The affected enhancements were safely disabled; the original goods manager remains available.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Error.RuntimeF: An enhancement failed: {error}. Falling back to the framework's original behavior; this error is logged only once per run.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Error.PatchAll: Applying Harmony patches failed: {error}. Add-on enhancements were stopped; the framework's original window remains available.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Settings.Enabl: When on, uses improved restock semantics, idempotency, save convergence, and silent background self-heal. When off, restores framework restock; inventory filtering is unaffected.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Settings.Verbo: Emits restock debug logs (including self-heal summaries). Off by default to avoid spam.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Settings.Resto: Reliable auto-restock is on by default. Colony hauling mechs (e.g. Lifter) assigned to the shop Restocker role can restock.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.R5Watc: Background restock self-heal is active (silent soft wake; no popup by default).
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.ProbeO: Restock patch target probe complete: all members found.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.ProbeM: Restock patch targets missing (affected features will degrade safely): {targets}
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.R1Appl: Restock semantic patches applied (always-fill threshold + strict-less CountNeeded).
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.R2Rese: Reservation idempotency patches applied (job token + Cancel sync).
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.R2Queu: Queue self-heal patches applied (orphan dirty + idle dispatch transaction).
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.R3Sett: Settings converge patch applied (Reconcile + dirty after ApplySettings).
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.R3UiAp: UI threshold assist patches applied (display/storage decoupled from Effective + drag follow).
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.Thresh: 0 = always fill to target.\nGreater than 0 = restock only when stock is below this value.\nWhen changing the target: always-fill follows automatically; custom thresholds are kept when possible.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.JobKey: Restock job loadID was 0; falling back to object-identity hash for token keys (logged once).
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.CopyDi: Copy this storage unit's restock status to the clipboard for bug reports. Read-only. (Dev mode)
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Restock.Repair: Re-sync restock scheduling to the current settings. Does not spawn items or change targets/thresholds. Not instant delivery. (Dev mode)
Restock scheduling repaired (will re-dispatch; not instant delivery).
Restock repair failed. Check mod settings.
Reliable auto-restock is off; repair is disabled.
